note: Core Rules, Tournament Companion (Event Companion), Detachment Points and Game Tracker were excluded by request (GW rulebook reproduction / client-side-only data / interactive tool with no static data).

primaryMissions.name: Take and Hold
primaryMissions.description: Hold the most objective markers across the battlefield.

tiers.text: You control more **objectives** than your opponent.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control.
For each of those **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**) if you control your **home objective**.
For each **objective** you control that you did not control at the start of the turn (excluding your **home objective**).

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control.
For each of those **objectives** that is within your opponent's territory.
You control one or more **central objectives**.
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
You control **three or more objectives**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control **two or more objectives**.
You control more **objectives** than your opponent.
You control your opponent's **home objective**.
One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn by a friendly unit that was within range of one or more **objectives**.
One or more enemy units that started the turn within range of one or more **objectives** were **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
You control one or more **objectives** you did not control at the start of the turn (excluding your **home objective**).

primaryMissions.name: Purge the Foe
primaryMissions.description: Destroy the enemy and dominate the battlefield through force.

tiers.text: **One or two** objectives are **consecrated**.
**Three or more** objectives are **consecrated**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control **more** objectives than your opponent.
The enemy **home objective** has been **consecrated**.
One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control more **objectives** than your opponent.
More enemy units were **destroyed** this turn than friendly units were **destroyed** in the previous turn.
One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
More enemy units were **destroyed** this turn than friendly units were **destroyed** in the previous turn.
You control your opponent's **home objective**.
One or more **condemned** enemy units left the battlefield this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control more **objectives** than your opponent.
You control your opponent's **home objective**.
One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
You control one or more **objectives** you did not control at the start of the turn (excluding your **home objective**).
You control one or more **central objectives**.

primaryMissions.name: Reconnaissance
primaryMissions.description: Scout the battlefield and seize key intelligence positions.

tiers.text: You control one or more **central objectives**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
For each friendly unit that **extracted intelligence** this turn (see reverse).
Three or more of your **operation markers** are on the battlefield.
One of your **operation markers** is within range of your opponent's **home objective**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase, from the second battle round onwards.
One unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**) that does not have any of your **operation markers** within range of it.
Unlimited. Each unit that starts this action this phase must be within range of a different **objective**.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
Place one of your **operation markers** within range of that **objective**.

tiers.text: Three or more friendly units are wholly within three different table quarters and not within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.
Four or more friendly units are wholly within four different table quarters and not within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.
For each enemy unit **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control one or more **central objectives**.
One or more enemy units that started the turn within a **terrain area** are **destroyed**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
No enemy units are wholly within your territory.

One or more enemy units were **surveilled** this turn (see reverse), unless each of those units is within range of one or more **objectives** that have one or more **operation markers** within range of them.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control more **objectives** than your opponent.
No enemy **operation markers** are on the battlefield.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit.
Unlimited.
Immediately.
Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your unit that has not been **surveilled** this turn: until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is **surveilled**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
One **objective** is **triangulated** (see reverse).
Two **objectives** are **triangulated**.
Three or more **objectives** are **triangulated**.
You control **four or more objectives**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase, from the second battle round onwards.
One friendly unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**).
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
That **objective** is **triangulated**: place one of your **operation markers** within range of that **objective**.

primaryMissions.name: Priority Assets
primaryMissions.description: Capture and hold the high value assets scattered across the field.

tiers.text: A friendly unit performed a **sensor sweep** this turn (see reverse).
One or more enemy units that started the turn within range of one or more **objectives** are **destroyed**.

Only one of your opponent's **operation markers** is on the battlefield, if one or more of your units are within the same terrain area as that **operation marker**, and no enemy units are within that terrain area.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).

Only one of your opponent's **operation markers** is on the battlefield, if one or more of your units are within the same terrain area as that **operation marker**, and no enemy units are within that terrain area.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one **central objective**.
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
Your unit **performs a sensor sweep**: remove one **operation marker** from the battlefield.
A unit cannot start this action if there is only one **operation marker** on the battlefield.

tiers.text: For each friendly unit that **committed sabotage** this turn (see reverse).
For each of those **units** that is within range of one or more **objectives** in your opponent's territory.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**).
Unlimited. Each unit that starts this **action** this phase must be within range of a different **objective**.
End of your turn, if that unit controls that **objective**.
Your unit **commits sabotage**.

tiers.text: A friendly unit **secured the asset** this turn (see reverse).
One or more enemy units that started the turn within range of one or more **central objectives** are **destroyed**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control **three or more objectives**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**).
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
Your unit **secures the asset**.

tiers.text: A friendly unit performed a **vanguard operation** this turn (see reverse).
One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
You control your opponent's **home objective**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within one terrain area that is within your **opponent's territory**.
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if no enemy units are within that **terrain area**.
Your unit **performs a vanguard operation**.

tiers.text: You control one or more **central objectives**.
For each of your **operation markers** within range of one of those **objectives** (see reverse).

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
One or more of those **objectives** is a **central objective**.
You control your opponent's **home objective**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one **central objective**.
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
Place one of your **operation markers** within range of that **objective**.

primaryMissions.name: Disruption
primaryMissions.description: Disrupt the enemy battle plan and deny them the field.

tiers.text: For each terrain area **trapped** this turn (see reverse).
For each of those **terrain areas** that is an **objective**.
One or more enemy units that started the turn within a terrain area were destroyed, if that terrain area is **trapped**.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.

One friendly unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**) or within one **terrain area** that is not within your deployment zone, that you have not yet **trapped** (see below).
Unlimited. Each unit that starts this **action** this phase must be within a different **terrain area**.
Immediately.
That **terrain area** is **trapped**: place one of your **operation markers** within that **terrain area**.

tiers.text: For each enemy unit **destroyed** this turn.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding **home objectives**).
You control one or more **central objectives** and one or more **expansion objectives**.
One or more enemy units that started the turn within range of one or more **objectives** are **destroyed**.
Only one of your operation markers remains (see reverse), with a unit of yours in that terrain area and no enemy units there.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
Only one of your operation markers remains, with a unit of yours in that terrain area and no enemy units there.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one **central objective**.
Once per turn.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
Your unit **performs a sensor sweep**: remove one **operation marker** from the battlefield.
A unit cannot start this **action** if there is only one **operation marker** on the battlefield.

tiers.text: You control the enemy **home objective**.
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** that is **decoyed** (see reverse).
For each of those **objectives** that is within your opponent's territory.

sections.trigger: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round)

tiers.text: You control one or more **objectives** (excluding your **home objective**).
**Four or more objectives** are **decoyed**.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one **objective** (excluding your **home objective**) that is not **decoyed** (see below).
Unlimited. Each unit that starts this **action** this phase must be within range of a different **objective**.
End of your turn, if your unit controls that **objective**.
That **objective** is **decoyed**: place one of your **operation markers** within range of that **objective**.

secondaryMissions.name: A Grievous Blow
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: If no enemy units with a Starting Strength of 13 or more are on the battlefield, you may discard this card and draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.text: For each enemy unit with a Starting Strength of 13 or more that is destroyed this turn.
One or more enemy units with a Starting Strength of 13 or more were destroyed this turn.

secondaryMissions.name: A Tempting Target
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: Your opponent selects one objective (excluding home objectives) within No Man's Land to be your tempting target.

rows.text: You control your tempting target.
For each enemy CHARACTER model destroyed this turn.
For each of those models with a Wounds characteristic of 4 or more.
One or more enemy CHARACTER models were destroyed this turn.
All enemy CHARACTER models have been destroyed during the battle.

secondaryMissions.name: Beacon
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: Choose one friendly unit on the battlefield, or embarked within a TRANSPORT on the battlefield, to be your beacon unit.

sections.trigger: End of your opponent's turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first)

rows.text: Your beacon unit is on the battlefield and not within your deployment zone.
Your beacon unit is on the battlefield and not within your territory.

secondaryMissions.name: Behind Enemy Lines
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: During the first battle round, you may shuffle this card back into your Secondary Mission deck and then draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.text: For each friendly unit (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.

secondaryMissions.name: Bring It Down
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: If there are no enemy models on the battlefield with a Wounds characteristic of 10 or more, you may discard this card and draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.text: For each enemy model with a Wounds characteristic of 10 or more that is destroyed this turn.
One or more enemy models with a Wounds characteristic of 10 or more were destroyed this turn.

secondaryMissions.name: Burden of Trust
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN / START OF YOUR TURN: For each objective, you may pick one friendly unit on the battlefield to guard that objective. From then until the start of your next turn, that objective counts as guarded by your army for as long as the chosen unit is within range of it and you control it.

sections.trigger: End of your opponent's turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first)

rows.text: For each objective guarded by your army.
One or more friendly units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield, and no enemy units are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield.
One or more friendly units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield, and no enemy units are within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

secondaryMissions.name: Cleanse
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: If you have the Plunder Secondary Mission active, you may shuffle this card back into your Secondary Mission deck and then draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One friendly unit within range of one objective (excluding your home objective).
Unlimited. Each unit that starts this action this phase must be within range of a different objective.
End of your turn, if that unit is controlling that objective.
That objective is cleansed by your army.

rows.text: One objective was cleansed by your army this turn.
Two or more objectives were cleansed by your army this turn.

secondaryMissions.name: Defend Stronghold
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: During the first battle round, shuffle this card back into your Secondary Mission deck and then draw one new Secondary Mission card.

sections.trigger: End of your opponent's turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first)

rows.text: You control your home objective.
No enemy units are within your deployment zone.
There are more friendly units than enemy units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) wholly within No Man's Land.
There are more friendly units than enemy units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) wholly within No Man's Land.

secondaryMissions.name: Engage on All Fronts
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: You have a presence in a table quarter if one or more friendly units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) are wholly within that table quarter and are not within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

rows.text: You have a presence in three table quarters.
You have a presence in four table quarters.
You have a presence in three table quarters.
You have a presence in four table quarters.

secondaryMissions.name: Forward Position
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: During the first battle round, you may shuffle this card back into your Secondary Mission deck and then draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.text: You control your opponent's home objective and/or each expansion objective.
For each enemy unit destroyed this turn.

secondaryMissions.name: Outflank
secondaryMissions.designerNote: Opposite battlefield edges are the ones that run parallel to each other.

rows.text: One or more friendly units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) are within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within your territory.
Two or more friendly units (excluding AIRCRAFT and battle-shocked units) are within 6" of opposite battlefield edges and one or more of those units is not within your territory.
For each enemy unit that started the turn within range of one or more objectives and is destroyed.

secondaryMissions.name: Plunder
secondaryMissions.whenDrawn: WHEN DRAWN: If you have the Cleanse Secondary Mission active, you may shuffle this card back into your Secondary Mission deck and then draw one new Secondary Mission card.

rows.v: Your Shooting phase.
One unit within a terrain area that is not within your territory.
Once per turn.
Immediately.
That terrain area is plundered.

rows.text: A terrain area was plundered this turn.
You control two or more objectives within No Man's Land (excluding your home objective).
